text.title: Frontend Design Variant Exploration Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure to apply Frontend Design Variant Exploration end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: brief
step.input: user goals + style adjectives + tech stack

step.name: brainstorm
step.action: Generate 3–5 variants, each in designs/variant-N-<slug>/, each compiling.

step.name: review
step.action: User reviews all; either picks one OR requests refinements (return to step 2 with notes).

step.name: refine
step.action: User-driven tweaks until ready to handoff.

step.name: storybook
step.action: Storybook agent builds stories for each component state.

step.name: component-finalize
step.action: Component agent extracts typed components into src/; deletes throw-away variant code from designs/.
